text:

pkg-message
files/patch-ab  files/patch-ac  files/patch-af

[sane-frontends]

Remove file:

Note:
SANE is split into sane-backends and sane-frontends from this version.

This PR supersedes ports/23830.

Since containts of those are merged, ports/23917 and ports/24685
should be superseded by this PR.
